# Transcrição: 11-List-Building with Lead Magnets

- **Fonte:** 11-List-Building with Lead Magnets
- **Duração:** 06:41

## [00:00 - 03:04]

Now that you know how email marketing can help you grow your business, we're going to look at some ways that you can bring in more leads. So let's start looking at different types of lead magnets that you can add to your toolbox to bring in more leads and boost your sales. You might be wondering, why do I need another lead magnet? Think about it this way. Some things are going to appeal to different people. Having a variety of lead magnets is going to let you reach more people. There's a couple of ways that you can create these lead magnets. You can consider making a tutorial video, an ebook, a webinar, PDF guides, an audio file or a link to your podcast. The list goes on. But no matter what format you choose, your lead magnets should always be an irresistible offer all on its own. The key is to pick something different from your original lead magnet. For example, if you created a short report for your first one, try doing a lead magnet that's a video or an audio guide. And that's the first step of creating additional lead magnets. Be different. You don't want to create lead magnets that do the same thing. Make the same offer to the same market. Make your lead magnet either a different offer to the same market or the same offer to a new market. For example, if you have a course on fitness and you made your first lead magnet a checklist on how to ensure a proper cool down and recovery, don't make your second lead magnet on the same topic. Instead, make a video about how you can get the most out of your workout or a PDF guide that helps people with their diet. Choose something that is still within your niche but addresses a different need. Another approach is to make a lead magnet that applies to a very specific range within your audience. Say you designed a course that helps parents of toddlers and your first lead magnet targets your entire audience. You could try to make a lead magnet that targets single moms specifically. Don't be afraid to try different ideas. Lead magnets are a great way to see what your audience wants from you. See what works and what doesn't. This applies to formats too. You can take the same idea and make a handout and a video lead magnet. Then see which one performs better. If you want to make the most of your lead magnets, you need to promote them. This ensures that you are reaching as many people as possible. It can seem daunting, but we're going to check it out a few fun and easy ways to promote your lead magnets. Let's start with social media. The easiest option is to add a link in your social media bio. Use a link tree if you need multiple different links in your bio for your website. However, you can add the lead magnet by itself. Instagram stories are a great way to promote your lead magnets, but they disappear after 24 hours. Adding them to a highlight gives them a permanent home on your page.

## [03:04 - 06:06]

Highlights live at the top of your Instagram profile and group together stories that have a common topic or theme. You can add multiple posts to that highlight in order to tell a complete story. For example, you can start by explaining what you do, introduce your lead magnet, then link the lead magnet and the reason someone should download it. Have fun and be creative with these highlights. You can also create dedicated posts for social media that showcase info in your lead magnets. This could be a picture, a video, a graphic. Again, have fun with this and be creative to what resonates with you and your brand. Be sure to include a strong call to action at the end that encourages people to check the link in your bio to get your lead magnet for themselves. There's one more place you can promote your lead magnets on social media. The banner or your cover image at the top of your profile. Think of this as the billboard on your profile. You can use Canva or other graphic designing tools to make fun banners that highlight what your lead magnets have to offer. Inside of social media, you can mention your lead magnets and other content you create. At the end of your videos or in a blog post, give a call to action here too and direct people to the specific place they can sign up. You can add a hotlink or a URL to the end of your email signature as well. So whenever you send an email to anyone, you're leading them to your sign up page. And when you're networking or making connections, your lead magnets are a great way to introduce new people to what you do. Check them to your social media for the easiest path to opt in. Don't just pick one of these options though. Do anything and everything to promote your lead magnets. It helps you to add people to your email list. You want as many people to know about your lead magnets as possible. Just like the topic of your lead magnet, different options appeal to different people. Some might not click on the link through email, but they will in an Instagram story or a video description. People need to see something at least six times before they take action. So don't just mention your lead magnets once or twice and think people are going to be tired of hearing about it. Consider this. Most people won't see a social media post even once. So you have to mention it multiple times. Sometimes you have to put these things in your highlights so that way they can see the story that you posted because they didn't catch it the day you posted it. You've gone over a lot when it comes to your email marketing and creating your lead magnets. Be creative as you think of different options you can provide. Then pick one way you want to start promoting that lead magnet. Write down your action plan, brainstorm ideas for videos or posts you can make around this new lead magnet, and even work on the wording in your bio to make your lead magnet truly irresistible. But remember, lead magnets will consistently change.

## [06:06 - 06:41]

You can get as creative in any season that you see fit. You can provide so much value through the lead magnets that leads them into your next offer, that leads them into your email list, that leads them into getting on a call with you. That's why they're called lead magnets, plural. You need to have multiple magnets out there to attract people to you and know that these leads are going to become people that live in your ecosystem. So keep providing them value and find these creative ways to get them to come and be a part of your vision.
